# Packrift Packaging Search Vocabulary Crosswalk

A public buyer-language crosswalk built from approved in-stock Packrift catalog tags, mapping packaging search phrases to matching product families, product types, and Packrift product URLs.

- Site: https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/
- Methodology: https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/methodology/
- Sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/sitemap.xml
- Terms CSV: https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/search-vocabulary-terms.csv
- Stats: https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/stats.json
